zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicie de Wavrin於1252年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林時，她的父親Hellin de WAVRIN37歲，母親Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN21歲。她於1268年與Baudouin de Lannoy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicie de Wavrin于1252年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林时，她的父亲Hellin de WAVRIN37岁，母亲Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN21岁。她于1268年与Baudouin de Lannoy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Amicie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

en.lifeSummary: When Amicie de Wavrin was born in 1252, in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Hellin de WAVRIN, was 37 and her mother, Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, was 21. She married Baudouin de Lannoy in 1268. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1307, in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicie de Wavrin est née en 1252, à Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hellin de WAVRIN, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Baudouin de Lannoy en 1268. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1307, à Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicie de Wavrin 1252 in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hellin de WAVRIN 37 und ihre Mutter Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN 21. Sie hat 1268 Baudouin de Lannoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1307 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Wavrin è nata il nel 1252 nel Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Hellin de WAVRIN, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Baudouin de Lannoy nel 1268. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1307, nel Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicie de Wavrinが1252年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Hellin de WAVRINは37歳，母Jeanne Maria D'OLHAINは21歳であった。1268年にBaudouin de Lannoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードリス-レズ-ラノイで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicie de Wavrin(이)가 1252년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hellin de WAVRIN(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1268년 Baudouin de Lannoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 리스-레즈-랜이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Wavrin nasceu em 1252, em Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hellin de WAVRIN, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Baudouin de Lannoy em 1268. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1307, em Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicie de Wavrin родилась в 1252 г. в местности ваврин, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Hellin de WAVRIN было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baudouin de Lannoy в 1268 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1307 г. в местности лис-лез-ланнои, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicie de Wavrin nació en 1252, en Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hellin de WAVRIN, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Baudouin de Lannoy en 1268. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1307, en Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
